title: 1981-04-16_Pat_170.txt
key_claims: Dick concludes his 2-3-74 experience was a literal encounter with the inner dialectical life of God Himself, specifically the dialectic described by Jakob Boehme and Paul Tillich: the "Dark," demonic, irrational side of God contained and converted by the "Bright," rational Logos (Wisdom) side.
*VALIS* and *The Divine Invasion* externalize this inner life of God's mind onto the world stage. YHWH is VALIS, and the AI voice is Ruah (the Spirit of God).

Humans are caught in a linear, horizontal cycle of reincarnation that repeats eternally because memory is erased at each birth. Salvation is an abrupt, vertical extrication from this timeline, triggered by *anamnesis* (remembering past lives).

Dick achieved this salvation through a synthesis of Grace and Reason: by reading Maimonides' *Guide to the Perplexed* in this life just as he did in a past life in Arabia, he linked the two times. YHWH responded to this act of piety with Grace, granting him the remembering (Gnosis) that lifted him out of the cycle.
recurring_concepts: **The Pulley (Vertical Extrication)**: The metaphor of sudden, right-angle salvation out of the horizontal loop of time and reincarnation.
reading_excerpt: Dick concludes his 2-3-74 experience was a literal encounter with the inner dialectical life of God Himself, specifically the dialectic described by Jakob Boehme and Paul Tillich: the "Dark," demonic, irrational side of God contained and converted by the "Bright," rational Logos (Wisdom) side.
